# Villa Cottages

> Two private A-frame cottages on a working apple orchard in Srinagar, Kashmir. Rated 4.9 on Google (124 reviews) and 4.8 on Airbnb. Private mosaic pool, Kashmir mountain views, stone fire circle, and 24/7 concierge.

## Property

- [Villa Cottages](https://www.villacottages.in): Booking, availability, rates, and full property information

## Key Facts

- Property type: Private boutique villa stay — two independent A-frame cottages
- Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir 190006, India
- Nearest city: Srinagar city centre (~45 minutes drive)
- Nearest airport: Sheikh ul-Alam International Airport, Srinagar (SXR) — ~50 minutes
- Distance from Gulmarg: ~1.5 hours drive
- Distance from Pahalgam: ~2.5 hours drive
- Price: ₹12,000 per night per cottage; ₹24,000 per night for both cottages
- Minimum stay: 1 night
- Ratings: 4.9 / 5 on Google (124 reviews); 4.8 / 5 on Airbnb
- Check-in: 2:00 PM | Check-out: 11:00 AM
- Pool: Private mosaic splash pool — seasonal, open May through October
- Contact: +91 87150 08939
- Email: villa.cottages.srinagar@gmail.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/villa.cottages/
- Airbnb: https://www.airbnb.co.in/rooms/1196823291856037309

## Amenities

- Two independent A-frame cottages, each with private kitchenette, bedroom, and bathroom
- Private mosaic splash pool surrounded by apple trees (May–October)
- Stone fire circle with seating — available on request
- Full access to working apple orchard — acres of apple trees to explore
- Clear mountain views of the Kashmir Himalayan ranges from every window
- WiFi throughout the property
- 24/7 host concierge — staff on property at all times
- Fresh linens and quality bedding
- Meals available on pre-order

## What Makes Villa Cottages Unique

Villa Cottages is not a hotel. It is a private orchard property — two A-frame cottages set inside a working apple orchard in Srinagar, Kashmir. Guests have the entire property to themselves. There are no shared lobbies, no other tourists, and no hotel corridors. Every window frames the Himalayan mountains and apple trees. The property has been described by guests as "a peaceful little dream" and "your own home in Srinagar, away from the hustle of the city." It is one of the few private orchard stays in Kashmir with a swimming pool, rated 4.9 stars on Google across 124 reviews.

## Private Events

Villa Cottages hosts private events with full orchard setup — low tables, lanterns, flowers, and candlelight. Event types: birthday parties, anniversaries, bridal showers, bachelorette parties, family gatherings, retirement celebrations. Enquire via WhatsApp: https://wa.me/918715008939

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Where is Villa Cottages located?**
Villa Cottages is located in Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir 190006, India — set inside a working apple orchard with direct views of the Kashmir Himalayan mountain ranges. It is approximately 45 minutes from Srinagar city centre, 50 minutes from Sheikh ul-Alam International Airport (SXR), and about 1.5 hours from the Gulmarg ski resort. The property is accessible by road year-round.

**How many cottages are there and can I book both?**
There are two private A-frame cottages — Luxury 1 and Luxury 2 — each with its own kitchenette, bedroom, and bathroom. They can be booked individually at ₹12,000 per night or together at ₹24,000 per night. Booking both gives your group exclusive use of the entire property including the pool and orchard.

**Is there a swimming pool?**
Yes. There is a private mosaic splash pool on the property, open from May through October. It is surrounded by apple trees, with sun loungers and a stone deck. The pool is exclusive to cottage guests — not shared with any other visitors.

**What is the check-in and check-out time?**
Check-in is at 2:00 PM and check-out is at 11:00 AM. Early check-in or late check-out may be possible subject to availability — contact the host in advance via WhatsApp at +91 87150 08939.

**Is it near Gulmarg or Pahalgam?**
Villa Cottages is approximately 1.5 hours from Gulmarg and 2.5 hours from Pahalgam, making it a practical base for day trips to both. Srinagar's Dal Lake, Nishat Bagh, Shalimar Bagh, and the old city are all within 45–60 minutes.

## Booking

Book directly at https://www.villacottages.in (best rates, instant availability calendar)
Also available on Airbnb: https://www.airbnb.co.in/rooms/1196823291856037309
